intro: A curated set of 5 Design problems frequently useful for Amazon interview prep. Focus on patterns, not brute memorization.

faqs.question: How many Design problems should I do for Amazon?
faqs.answer: Quality over quantity: master patterns with 5 well-understood problems, then expand.

faqs.question: Where should I start?
faqs.answer: Start Easy/Medium in this list, then tackle Hard variants. Pair with the Design topic page and related roadmaps.

seo.title: Best Design Questions for Amazon | AlgoForge
seo.description: Top Design coding interview questions for Amazon. Practice list, FAQs, and pattern links.
